paper.title: The effect of polypropylene fibers on the properties of fresh and hardened lightweight self-compacting concrete
paper.authors: H. Mazaheripour; S. Ghanbarpour; S.H. Mirmoradi; I. Hosseinpour

conditions.applies_to: GP and IP polypropylene fiber LLSCC mixes

evidence.evidence_text: Fiber mixes GP0.1/0.2/0.3 and IP0.1/0.2/0.3 list natural aggregates, LECA aggregates, cement 500, silica fume 47 or 48, limestone 200, water 160, superplasticizer 17.20 or 18.68, and polypropylene fiber 0.9/1.8/2.7 kg/m3.
28-day compressive strength mean values (MPa): GP0.0 25.3, GP0.1 24.6, GP0.2 26.3, GP0.3 24.6, IP0.0 21.5, IP0.1 21.7, IP0.2 22.7, IP0.3 22.8.
